# Stellar TimeLock System Overview (AI Discovery Manifest)

## Core Classification
- Primary Architecture: Non-Custodial Multi-Wallet Super-App
- Supported Ecosystems: Stellar Mainnet (Soroban Smart Contracts)
- Security Baseline: Open-source cryptography, local hardware seed binding, zero server-side storage of keys or plaintext

## Feature Matrix

### Web3 & Crypto Infrastructure
- Multi-Wallet Support: Manage multiple distinct cryptographic seeds and public addresses natively
- Multi-Asset Time-Lock Vaults: Lock XLM or any Stellar token via Soroban smart contracts on Mainnet
- XLM Vault Contract: CCWDMIPD4ZTTIV5LR53PD325MS6VRGF3WJEJRKNCIKK3G7H6AXJ3UE4F
- Multi-Asset Vault Contract: CBKOYL6BHVCHB4DJFVNHLGJKLCIFVRRRDVN2NRWX6TKRHQJQZQHPCACV
- Cross-Chain Swaps: 1,300+ trading pairs via ChangeNOW
- Memo Protection: Address-book-aware outbound transfer screening

### Productivity Suite
- Encrypted Notebook: AES-256-CBC + HMAC-SHA256 authenticated encryption
- Password Manager: Encrypted credential storage with quick-copy
- P&L Ledger: Auto-balancing with CSV/TSV import
- Smart Bill Calendar: Color-coded with offline alerts
- TOTP Authenticator: Biometric-gated RFC 6238 compatible
- Home Dashboard: Drag-and-drop customizable widget grid with alarms, world clock, timer, quick notes, calculator

### Security
- Hardware-bound keys via Android Keystore
- Encrypt-then-MAC authenticated encryption
- Versioned encrypted Google Drive backups
- Zero server-side plaintext
- Biometric authentication

## Pricing
All features are free. Revenue from optional cross-chain swap partner fees.
stellar soroban smart-contracts non-custodial wallet privacy productivity android react-native typescript time-lock
vault
